title: Automated Hydroponics AI
subtitle: An Intelligent Reinforcement Learning Powered Hydroponics Platform
shortDescription: A complete AI-driven hydroponics platform integrating IoT, computer vision, reinforcement learning and cloud infrastructure for autonomous controlled environment agriculture.
longDescription:
## Overview

A complete AI-driven hydroponics platform integrating IoT, computer vision, reinforcement learning and cloud infrastructure for autonomous controlled environment agriculture.

## Status

Active

## Research Areas

Reinforcement Learning, Computer Vision, IoT

## Paper Status

In Preparation

title: LipiNet
subtitle: Rethinking Handwritten Character Recognition
shortDescription: A lightweight structural-prior architecture for multi-script handwritten character recognition introducing Persistent Scaffold Injection.
longDescription:
## Overview

A lightweight structural-prior architecture for multi-script handwritten character recognition introducing Persistent Scaffold Injection.

## Status

Submitted to NeurIPS

## Research Areas

OCR, Handwritten Character Recognition, Deep Learning

## Paper Status

Submitted

title: 3DFaceARC
subtitle: Self-Supervised 3D Face Reconstruction from a Single Image
shortDescription: A graph neural network based self-supervised framework for reconstructing high-quality 3D facial geometry from monocular RGB images.
longDescription:
## Overview

A graph neural network based self-supervised framework for reconstructing high-quality 3D facial geometry from monocular RGB images.

## Status

Research

## Research Areas

3D Vision, Graph Neural Networks

## Paper Status

In Preparation

title: Parikar
subtitle: Nepali Food Classification
shortDescription: A deep learning system for recognizing traditional Nepali cuisine across ten food categories. The project compares multiple CNN architectures including YOLOv8, Inception and VGG.
